title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Solara Active Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Solara Active Pharma in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Solara Active Pharma:
Solara Active Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Solara Active Pharma!
